zh-CN.title: 插件市场维护通知
zh-CN.body:
由于插件市场迁移维护，2025年6月25日至6月31日期间投稿的插件数据未同步。

请在这段时间内投稿过的开发者，将客户端更新至最新版本后重新投稿。

造成不便，敬请谅解。

en-US.title: Plugin Market Maintenance Notice
en-US.body:
Due to plugin market migration, plugins submitted between June 25 and June 31 were not synced.

If you submitted a plugin during this period, please update to the latest client version and resubmit.

We apologize for the inconvenience.
